summary: Comprehensive backend testing of TradeFeedX. All 26 pytest tests passed (100%) covering auth (signup/login/me/logout), posts/feed (foryou/trending/following), like toggle, outcome updates with win-rate sync, search by ticker/username, profile, follow toggle, settings PATCH, upload + media serving via Emergent object storage, Finnhub news + ticker, Gemini 3.1 Pro AI trade analysis with a real Unsplash chart image, and insights/cleanup. No backend issues found.

minor.issue: Does not require auth (anyone can call); harmless but inconsistent. Returns ok:true even with no session cookie.
set_cookie uses samesite='none' with secure=True which is correct for cross-site, but cookie won't be sent with Bearer-only flows. Not a bug, just noted.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~780 lines and mixes auth, posts, uploads, AI, news, and insights. Consider splitting into modules (auth.py, posts.py, ai.py, storage.py) once it grows further.
news_ticker calls await news() but news() ignores its category default cleanly; ok but tightly coupled to network. No caching — every ticker poll hits Finnhub.
AI analyze-trade JSON parser falls back silently when Gemini returns non-JSON; consider logging the raw text on parse-failure for observability.
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handlers.
follow_user does not prevent following a private account without approval — feature gap if private accounts should require approval.
delete_post does not invalidate likes count for users (only deletes likes docs) — fine, but no cascade for outcomes counters if a 'win' post is deleted.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ users via signup during follow/signup tests; demotrader had a TEST_post created with ticker AAPL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. backend_test.py covers all endpoints requested. AI tests use a real Unsplash chart image and call gemini-3.1-pro-preview via emergentintegrations — they take ~5-10s. Frontend has not been tested in this iteration.
